content.full_text:
June 10, 1986


Steve Vaccariello, Treasurer
Frank Hill for Assembly Committee
2036 N. Beachwood Dr., #10
Los Angeles, CA 90068-3432

Re: Your Request for Advice
FPPC No. A-86-155

Dear Mr. Vaccariello:

Thank you for your letter of May 4, 1986, concerning the
campaign reporting provisions of the Political Reform Act.

As requested, I am enclosing the 1986 "Information Manual on
Campaign Disclosure Provisions of the Political Reform Act." For
your information, the manual has been available from your filing
officers for several months now.

You have asked a number of questions which I will respond to
in the order presented in your letter.

Whenever there is a change in the information contained in a
Statement of Organization, an amended Form 410 must be filed
within ten days. In amending a Statement of Organization, it is
not necessary to complete the entire form. To report the change
of address for a committee treasurer, indicate that you are filing
an amendment, provide the identification number of the committee,
include the name of the committee, the new address for the
treasurer and sign the form.

During the seven week period when you will not be available to
carry out the responsibilities of treasurer, you must designate
someone as treasurer and amend the committee's Statement of
Organization, Form 410, to reflect the change in treasurers. On
the amended Form 410, or in a cover letter, indicate that the
change in treasurer is temporary, and that upon your return, the
Form 410 will again be amended to show you as the committee's
treasurer.

The May and October pre-election statements must be delivered
in person or mailed through the U.S. Postal Service's guaranteed
overnight delivery service. There are, however, some cities where


428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

Mr. Vaccariello
June 10, 1986
Page Two


the U.S. Postal Service cannot guarantee 24 hour service. If this
is the case, then any guaranteed overnight delivery service may be
used.

     I hope the above answers your questions. Please do not
hesitate to contact me if you have additional questions.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]
                                        Mary Ann Kvasager
                                        Political Reform Consultant

MAK:kt

Enclosures: Form 410, Statement of Organization,
           1986 "Information Manual on Campaign
           Disclosure Provisions of the Political
           Reform Act"

r     t'    t     `

May 8  8 44 AH  ub
                                May 4, 1986

State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street #800
Sacramento, CA  95804

To Whom it May Concern:

     Please advise and assist on the following matters:

     1)  I have not yet received the 1986 Information Manual on Campaign Dis-
closure Provisions.  Please send a copy as soon as possible (if, of course,
its been printed.)  I'm afraid I might have missed it.

     2)  I will be changing my permanent address soon.  What form, if any, is
necessary to officially change a committees' treasurers' address?

     3)  In a couple of months I will be in traing with the U.S. Air Force and
out of California for about 7 weeks - possibly through a filing period.  What
must officially be done to temporarily turn over the treasurer's responsibilities
to another person?

     4)  Regarding the provision that requires the May and October pre-election
statements to be sent by overnight mail -- Is Federal Express OK?  It is so
much more convenient than the Post Office.

     Thank you very much, in advance, for your attention and help.


                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]
                                        Steve Vaccariello
                                        Treasurer

FRANK HILL FOR ASSEMBLY COMMITTEE
#820144
2036 N. Beachwood Drive #10
Los Angeles, CA  90068-3432

Day Phone: 213-664-1937

TO: ( ) JOHN L. ( ) BOB L. ( ) AL ( ) JEANNE
    ( ) JOHN K. ( ) KATHY ( ) MARY ANN
    ( ) LYNN ( ) JOHN M. ( ) CARLA
    ( ) JAY ( ) ROGER ( ) HELEN
                                        ( ) OTHER: _______________

[ ]TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW

[ ]CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
    (IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

FILE LOCATION: A 86-155

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ] NO [ ]


CALLER: STEVE VIACCARELLO

REPRESENTING: TREASURER/ FRANK HILL

PHONE NUMBER: FOR ASSEMBLY COM.

QUESTION: What must be done to temporarily turn over
the duties of treasurer for a seven-week
period of time, procedures for amending a 410
and is it ok to mail the may/october
pre-election statements by federal express

ANSWER: A new treasurer must be designated for
the 7-week period of time. In amending
the 410 an indication should be made
that the change in treasurer is temporary.
may/october pre-election statement must be sent
through the U.S. Postal Service's guaranteed
overnight delivery -- or in person

FROM: WASAGER

DATE: 6/10/86
